
---
title: "Home"
---
![](./img/old_map.jpg)

### This page: <https://heima.hafro.is/~julian/ftp/index.html>

### Datasets: <https://heima.hafro.is/~julian/ftp/data.zip>

## Schedule

### Monday — 10:00 to 17:00

| Time | Session | Topics |
|------|---------|--------|
| 10:00 – 11:30 | [Introduction](intro.qmd) | Course overview, R & RStudio setup, tidyverse, Quarto |
| 11:30 – 11:45 | *Break* | |
| 11:45 – 13:00 | [Spatial data concepts](spatial_data.qmd) | Vector vs raster models, points/lines/polygons, sp vs sf ecosystem |
| 13:00 – 14:00 | *Lunch* | |
| 14:00 – 15:30 | [Mapping with ggplot — part 1](ggplot1.qmd) | |
| 15:30 – 15:45 | *Break* | |
| 15:45 – 17:00 | [Mapping with ggplot — part 1, continued](ggplot1.qmd) | |

### Tuesday — 09:00 to 17:00

| Time | Session | Topics |
|------|---------|--------|
| 09:00 – 10:30 | [Simple features (sf)](sf.qmd) | sfg / sfc / sf class structure, building sf objects, POINT & LINESTRING geometries |
| 10:30 – 10:45 | *Break* | |
| 10:45 – 12:00 | [Simple features — continued](sf.qmd) | Making sf objects from data frames, operating with attributes, class Spatial |
| 12:00 – 13:00 | *Lunch* | |
| 13:00 – 14:30 | [Working with geometries](geometric.qmd) | Sampling, centroids, buffers, convex/concave hulls, grids, simplification |
| 14:30 – 14:45 | *Break* | |
| 14:45 – 16:00 | [Working with geometries — continued](geometric.qmd) | Measurements, distances, aggregation, attribute-geometry relationships |
| 16:00 – 17:00 | [Spatial operations](spatial_ops.qmd) | Binary predicates, DE-9IM model, spatial subsetting, spatial joins |

### Wednesday — 09:00 to 17:00

| Time | Session | Topics |
|------|---------|--------|
| 09:00 – 09:30 | [Spatial operations — continued](spatial_ops.qmd) | |
| 09:30 – 10:30 | [Coordinate reference systems](crs.qmd) | Ellipsoids, datums, projections, PROJ/EPSG, st_transform(), CRS in ggplot |
| 10:30 – 10:45 | *Break* | |
| 10:45 – 12:00 | [Coordinate reference systems — continued](crs.qmd) | |
| 12:00 – 13:00 | *Lunch* | |
| 13:00 – 14:30 | [Rasters](rasters.qmd) | Raster data model, RasterLayer / Brick / Stack, reading files, metadata |
| 14:30 – 14:45 | *Break* | |
| 14:45 – 17:00 | [Rasters — continued](rasters.qmd) | Extraction, masks, raster algebra, focal & zonal statistics |

### Thursday — 09:00 to 17:00

| Time | Session | Topics |
|------|---------|--------|
| 09:00 – 09:30 | [Rasters — continued](rasters.qmd) | Resampling, reprojecting, rasterization, ggplot with rasters, stars package |
| 09:30 – 10:30 | [Reading & writing spatial data](input_output.qmd) | GDAL, shapefiles, GeoPackages, CSVs, st_read() / st_write() |
| 10:30 – 10:45 | *Break* | |
| 10:45 – 11:00 | [Reading & writing spatial data — continued](input_output.qmd) | |
| 11:00 – 12:00 | [Mapping with ggplot — part 2](ggplot2.qmd) | Colour scales, ICES rectangles, scalebars, north arrows, customization |
| 12:00 – 13:00 | *Lunch* | |
| 13:00 – 14:30 | [Interactive maps](interactive.qmd) | leaflet basics, data input, layer calls, colour mapping, basemaps |
| 14:30 – 14:45 | *Break* | |
| 14:45 – 17:00 | [Interactive maps — continued](interactive.qmd) | Polygons, lines, rasters, layer controls, mapdeck for large datasets |

### Friday — 09:00 to 14:00

| Time | Session | Topics |
|------|---------|--------|
| 09:00 – 10:30 | [Interpolation](interpolation.qmd) | Voronoi polygons, nearest-neighbour, inverse distance weighting (IDW) |
| 10:30 – 10:45 | *Break* | |
| 10:45 – 12:00 | [Interpolation — continued](interpolation.qmd) | Kriging with variogram fitting, GAMs |
| 12:00 – 13:00 | *Lunch* | |
| 13:00 – 14:00 | Wrap-up & open exercises | Participants work on data of their choice; instructors available for questions |

## Time allocation by section - the original

Posit Assistant: Do not touch this section

| Section | File | Total time |
|---------|------|------------|
| Introduction | [intro.qmd](intro.qmd) | 1h 30m |
| Spatial data concepts | [spatial_data.qmd](spatial_data.qmd) | 1h 15m |
| Simple features (sf) | [sf.qmd](sf.qmd) | 2h 45m |
| Working with geometries | [geometric.qmd](geometric.qmd) | 2h 45m |
| Spatial operations | [spatial_ops.qmd](spatial_ops.qmd) | 1h 30m |
| Coordinate reference systems | [crs.qmd](crs.qmd) | 2h 15m |
| Rasters | [rasters.qmd](rasters.qmd) | 4h 15m |
| Reading & writing spatial data | [input_output.qmd](input_output.qmd) | 1h 15m |
| Mapping with ggplot | [ggplot.qmd](ggplot.qmd) | 3h 45m |
| Interactive maps | [interactive.qmd](interactive.qmd) | 3h 45m |
| Interpolation | [interpolation.qmd](interpolation.qmd) | 2h 45m |
| Wrap-up & open exercises | — | 1h 00m |
| **Total** | | **28h 45m** |

## Contact info
Julian M. Burgos
Email: julian.burgos(at) hafogvatn.is

Einar Hjorleifsson
Email: einar.hjorleifsson (at) hafogvatn.is
